name: Rustic Cedar Shrimp with Lemon Butter
recipeIngredient: Olive oil for coating, plus 2 tablespoons
1 pound shrimp, head on and in shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill.
2. Oil one side of the cedar plank.
3. Assemble the plank: Toss the tomatoes and onions with 1 tablespoon of oil and Creole spice. Lay out the tomatoes and onions on the cedar plank, ensuring they do not touch the edge.
4. In a separate bowl, toss the shrimp with the remaining oil and season with Creole spice. Lay out the shrimp on top of the tomatoes and onions.
5. Place the assembled plank in the center of the grill.
6. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Serve with lemon butter.
Yield: 2 servings
